Name: GRAPHICS_CONFIG_CS_DOF_QUALITY_DETAIL
Description: Determines the parameters of each depth of field quality level.

Fields.Name: Enable Depth-of-Field
Fields.Description: If ON, depth of field is enabled.

Fields.Name: Force High Resolution Blur
Fields.Description: Changes the HiResolutionBlur setting (-1 is forced off, 0 is default, 1 is forced on)

Fields.Name: Maximum Blur Level
Fields.Description: Changes the maximum blur level. (2 is maximum, 1 is lower level by one, 0 is reduced accuracy
